title: Samurai cit
description: This set of textures will replace the netherite sword with katanas
body:
# This set of textures will replace the netherite sword with katanas.

# Katanas can be obtained by renaming the anvil of a netherite sword.

# The katana stand is made of leather (insert the leather part that will be the stand into the frame, then insert the katana into the frame one block below).
